title: Understanding Weight on the Moon
text: The gravitational force on the Moon is one-sixth of that on Earth. This means that the weight of an object on the Moon is one-sixth of its weight on Earth.

title: Relating Moon Weight to Earth Weight
text: If the weight on the Moon is $$250$$ N, then the weight on Earth can be calculated by multiplying the Moon weight by $$6$$.

title: Calculate Earth Weight
text: Use the relationship between Moon weight and Earth weight to find the weight of the astronaut on Earth. Multiply the Moon weight by $$6$$.
